header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with creeping darkness. Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or divine.

labels.text: The weapon gains a two-action Interact and command activation allowing it to attempt to counteract the light cantrip (but not other light effects) with a counteract rank equal to half the item's level rounded up.
The weapon can cast penumbral shroud once per day.
The weapon can cast darkness once per day
The weapon can cast chilling darkness once per day
The weapon can cast penumbral shroud, darkness and chilling darkness, each once per day, heightened to 4th rank
The weapon can cast penumbral shroud, darkness and chilling darkness, each once per day, heightened to 6th rank
The weapon can cast 9th-level eclipse burst once per day
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d6 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with creeping darkness.

labels.text: Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d6 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d8 additional cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait
The additional cold damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances
On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying the additional cold damage, the target gains weakness 1 to darkness until the beginning of your next turn
On a critical hit, darkness shrouds the target’s vision, causing everything around it to be concealed to it unless it has darkvision
On a critical hit with the weapon, the target must attempt a Fortitude save against the weapon’s DC. On a failure, it’s blinded for 1 round by magical darkness unless it has greater darkvision

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with creeping darkness.

labels.text: Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent cold damage as encroaching darkness slowly drains their warmth away; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1d6 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
On a critical hit, darkness shrouds the target’s vision, causing everything around it to be concealed to it unless it has darkvision.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1d8 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional cold damage and 1d10 persistent cold damage as the darkness saps warmth; this additional damage has the darkness trait.
The additional damage and persistent cold damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances.

On a critical hit, or as long as the target is suffering from the persistent cold damage, darkness shrouds the target’s vision, causing everything around it to be concealed to it unless it has darkvision.

On a critical hit with a weapon, the target must attempt a Fortitude save against the weapon’s DC. On a failure, it’s blinded for 1 round by magical darkness unless it has greater darkvision; even on a success or critical success, everything around it is concealed to it unless it has greater darkvision.

The persistent darkness devours the light. Each time the target takes the persistent cold damage from this property, the darkness attempts to counteract one light effect on the target or the target’s belongings with a counteract rank of 10 and a counteract modifier of +33.

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with churning earth. Choose when you first imbue the weapon for the granted spells to be either arcane or primal.

labels.text: The weapon can cast scatter screeSOM as a cantrip, heightened to half the item’s level rounded up
The weapon can cast pummeling rubble once per day.
The weapon can cast pummeling rubble once per day as a 2nd-rank spell
The weapon can cast earthbind once per day
The weapon can cast pummeling rubble, earthbind and stoneskin once per day each as a 4th-rank spell
The weapon can cast pummeling rubble, earthbind, and stoneskin once per day each as a 6th-rank spell
The weapon can cast pummeling rubble, earthbind, stoneskin and earthquake once per day each as an 8th-rank spell
Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait.
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d6 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait.

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with churning earth.

labels.text: Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d4 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d6 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait
Strikes with the weapon deal 1d8 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone; this additional damage has the earth trait
The additional piercing damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances. Even if the weapon normally deals piercing damage, this benefit only applies to the additional damage.
On a successful Strike with the weapon, before applying the additional piercing damage, the target gains weakness 1 to earth until the beginning of your next turn

On a critical hit, the piercing rock shards attach the target’s feet to the ground, forcing extra effort to break the rocks and move from its current space. As long as it was on the ground, its first 5 feet of movement are difficult terrain, typically preventing it from Stepping. This effect lasts until it moves or for 1 minute, whichever comes first.

On a critical hit, the piercing rock shards attach the target’s feet to the ground, forcing extra effort to break the rocks and move from its current space. As long as it was on the ground, its first 5 feet of movement are difficult terrain, typically preventing it from Stepping. This effect lasts until it moves or for 1 minute, whichever comes first. If the creature breaks the rocks connecting it to the ground by moving, it takes an additional 1d8 piercing damage, which has the earth trait. If the creature instead chooses to wait the effect out for 1 minute without moving, it doesn’t take the additional damage.

header.description: NOTE!!!: The effects of this imbuement have not yet been automated. You imbue the weapon with churning earth.

labels.text: Strikes with the weapon deal 1 persistent piercing damage as stone spikes grow and pierce them; this additional damage has the earth trait.

Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone and 1 persistent piercing as stone spikes grow and pierce them; this additional damage and persistent damage each have the earth trait

Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone and 1d6 persistent piercing as stone spikes grow and pierce them; this additional damage and persistent damage each have the earth trait

Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone and 1d8 persistent piercing as stone spikes grow and pierce them; this additional damage and persistent damage each have the earth trait

Strikes with the weapon deal 1 additional piercing damage from spikes of stone and 1d10 persistent piercing as stone spikes grow and pierce them; this additional damage and persistent damage each have the earth trait

The additional damage and persistent piercing damage dealt by this imbued property ignores resistances. Even if the main weapon deals piercing damage, this benefit only applies to the piercing damage from this imbued property

While a target is suffering from the persistent piercing damage, the earth spikes growing on the target transform into an earthen shield that blocks their attacks against you. Whenever they hit you with a Strike, you gain resistance to physical damage (except adamantine) to that Strike with a value equal to the persistent piercing damage.

Foes suffering from the persistent piercing damage become very partially petrified in their extremities, making fine movements difficult. They are clumsy 1 as long as they have the persistent piercing damage.

On a critical hit, the piercing rock shards attach the target’s feet to the ground, forcing extra effort to move from its current space. As long as it was on the ground, its first 5 feet of movement are difficult terrain, typically preventing it from Stepping. This effect lasts until it moves or for 1 minute, whichever comes first.
